subcodes.first_line: My Supreme Pen hath testified from the direction of the luminous Spot at the Lote-Tree beyond which there is no passing that there is none other God but He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد شهد قلمی الاعلی من شطر البقعه البیضاء من سدره المنتهی انه لا اله الا هو
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @suffering and imprisonment
